name: @radzor/agent-router
description: Route prompts to different AI models or agents based on intent classification. Supports static rule-based routing, LLM-powered intent detection, and fallback chains for reliable multi-agent orchestration.

inputs.name: apiKey
inputs.description: API key for the classifier LLM used to detect intent (OpenAI-compatible).

inputs.name: classifierModel
inputs.description: Model to use for intent classification.

inputs.name: baseUrl
inputs.description: Base URL for the classifier API.

inputs.name: fallbackAgent
inputs.description: Name of the agent to use when no intent matches. If not set, routing throws on no match.

outputs.name: routeResult
outputs.description: The result of routing a prompt to an agent.

fields.name: selectedAgent
fields.description: Name of the agent that handled the prompt.

fields.name: confidence
fields.description: Confidence score of the intent classification (0-1).

fields.name: response
fields.description: The response from the selected agent.

events.name: onRouted
events.description: Fired when a prompt is successfully routed to an agent.

events.name: onFallback
events.description: Fired when routing falls back to the default agent.

actions.name: route
actions.description: Classify the prompt's intent and route it to the best matching agent.

actions.name: registerAgent

params.name: handler
params.description: Async function that takes a prompt and returns a response.

params.name: intents
params.description: List of intent labels this agent handles.

params.name: description
params.description: Description of what this agent does (used by the LLM classifier).

actions.description: Register an agent with its intents and handler function.

actions.name: removeAgent

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the agent to remove.

actions.description: Remove a registered agent. Returns true if the agent existed.

actions.name: listAgents
actions.description: List all registered agents with their intents and descriptions.

connectsTo.description: Alert when routing falls back to default agent

llm.constraints: Requires an OpenAI-compatible API key for intent classification. Agent handlers are user-provided async functions. Uses native fetch (Node.js 18+).
